Example Document

Author

Matthew Beckman

This is a sandbox document for us to practice different aspects of Quarto. For example, Figure 1 shows the histogram of diamonds prices (cite diamonds here) (Wickham, 2019).

We created Figure 1 using the tools from the {ggplot2} package (citation here)(Wickham, 2016).

Figure 2 is a static image example.

References

Wickham, H. (2016). ggplot2: Elegant graphics for data analysis. https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org
Wickham, H. (2019). Dataset: Diamonds from Hadley’s ggplot2. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/ZENODO.3522105
